reviews.review_title: The Best 3D Arcade Space shooter for Go!
reviews.review_description:
The Best 3D Arcade Space shooter for the Oculus Go!

This game is a must, well done !!

No doubt this shooter is really really good and challenging! Only drawback is the in game purchase for the next levels. 

Update: Oculus allows to refund any game within 30 play minutes;-)

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review Sebastian. I understand you don't like the "in-game purchase" system, but it is the only way I have to let you try before buy. And I'm happy you tried ! :) 
EDIT: I agree with your update. The difference is, actually, you can try as long as you want :D. The comment system does not warn me when you update your answer, would you like to write to me so I can explain more ? cedric@anceder.com :).

reviews.review_description: Super fun, as other said, better than was expecting.

This game was recommended by the Youtuber "Second Opinion Games". It is indeed amazing to be able to play a retro style game in VR with an Xbox Controller. The best feature is to be able to rotate the world at any angle so you can lay on your bead looking at the ceiling and play the game very comfortably. For the first time you actually feel like you are weightless floating in space behind a space ship with a giant planet below. Gameplay is king here.

The music is very good : C64/Amiga demo scene like with fantastic sound effects

My problem with the game is that I paid for everything (all levels), but all the levels are still locked, I need to complete the 10 minute level at normal difficulty without any checkpoint. This game is too hard and frustrating, you die after 9 minutes of play, you start over from the beginning, but only after many useless loading menu screens. Remember Shadow Of the Beast? That is the feel.

I don't mind the difficulty, but I probably will never be to unlock any level that I paid for. Pleas allow me to play any level (without official scoring maybe).

developer_response.body:
Hi MarquisDeSang,
Thank you very much for the review. Please send a email at cedric@anceder.com and I will try to help you :D

reviews.review_title: Your search for a good game is over
reviews.review_description: If you love shoot em ups or even if you don’t.  This game is perfect. Don’t even think about just press the download button :-)
This one takes me back... but then throws it into VR with awesome looking environments.  Great game!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much Darwins ! You having fun is a good reward for my work :D.

reviews.review_title: Old school shoot'em up.Very catchy music
reviews.review_description:
At first the demo gave me a good impression. The music was good. Then some months after I decided to buy it hoping the other levels were as good as the first one. And this games did not disappoint. The music very original is the first thing my mind liked. Then the sound effects for everything you shoot. Also very original. The graphics were very good also. Very old school amazing shooter. It's like playing those old arcade games in virtual reality. With the final boss in each level. I really enjoyed this game and didn't regret buying it as very often happens in this platform vr games. The music is what I like the most very clear very professional and original  and the variety of the levels and enemies were exceptional. The game is very complete as it was made by a big developers but as I read the credits it was made by one developer. I know there is not going to be more games like this in the gear vr but I hope the developer could still make games for the next vr platforms.

Also the settings are very complete. And the option to customize your ship. Very very complete game.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review. You enchanted my day. I'm really glad you enjoy my work. Thanks also for mentionning the work on the sound, I hope you tried the game with headphones to enjoy more :). Yes, I plan to make another things for future VR hardware, I just need time to increase my skills, as I'm alone.  Cedric :)

reviews.review_description: Excellent horizontal shooter. Great graphics and the difficulty setting is spot on. Pretty amazing for a independent developer and highly recommended.

developer_response.body: Thank you Evil Elvis ! It's a pleasure :)

reviews.review_description:
Fantastic game, very well thought out and very addictive. By far the best be game I’ve come across. Well done guys
Hi Cedric, not only do you make fantastic games , your after sales help is priceless .you managed to cover all the bases with your reply , very helpful indeed, I thought I may have been missing something , but it seems I’ve pretty much got the hang  of things . Oh I play it on the oculus go , so far I haven’t played it with a headset as I have 5 children and god knows what they will do to me if I can’t see or hear 😂😂will get some soon as even without it’s amazing and what a choice of music and effects. I’m 53 and have played a lot of games in my life , as far back as “ Phoenix “, tempest,R type etc , Anceder without a doubt best ever !!!! Thanks Rick,Johnny concrete 
I

developer_response.body: Really nice ! Thank you very much Rick/Johnny :D
